name: Gassal Simulator
short_description: Gassal Simulator is a unique simulation game that gives players the traditional gasilhane experience. Gassal Simulator is a unique simulation game that gives players the traditional gasilhane experience.
detailed_description:
Gassal Simulator is a unique simulation game that allows players to experience the traditional ghusl (Islamic funeral washing) process. In this game, you take on the role of a gassal, performing the ritual washing, shrouding, and preparation for burial in accordance with Islamic traditions.

Key Features:

  • Realistic Simulation Mechanics – Every stage of the ghusl process is carefully designed to provide an authentic and immersive experience.

  • Vehicle Mechanics – Drive through the city, visiting funeral tents to collect the deceased with your vehicle.

  • Detailed Environment Design – Realistic graphics and meticulously designed locations create an immersive atmosphere.

  • Various Scenarios and Missions – Players can experience different aspects of the profession through diverse missions and challenges.

  • Relaxing and Engaging Atmosphere – The game's calm and respectful tone offers a peaceful gameplay experience.

  • Cemetery Mechanics – Includes burial procedures and transportation mechanics for a complete funeral simulation.

Gassal Simulator provides a culturally immersive and educational experience, helping players gain insight into an important tradition. If you enjoy realistic simulation games with meaningful themes, this game is perfect for you!
